reviews.comment:
Pésima experiencia, hace un rato 00:25 de la noche estacione y el playero estaba cargando nafta a un auto y charlando, estuvo 10 minutos literal charlando y él surtidor ya había cortado, al momento de cobrarle con tarjeta siguieron charlando como si fueran los únicos esperando ( había un señor con una amarok blanca que ya se había bajado y tmb estaba enojado de tanta espera… además podría haber puesto a cargar nuestros autos y seguir charlando, no me ofreció limpiar los vidrios y fue medio mal educado ( esto acaba de suceder hoy 15 de mayo a las 00:30hs y el playero era un chico medio morocho !!!!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible experience, a little while ago at 00:25 at night I parked and the gas station attendant was filling up a car and chatting, he literally spent 10 minutes chatting and the pump had already cut off, when it was time to charge him with a card they continued chatting as if they were the only ones waiting (there was a man with a white Amarok who had already gotten out and was also angry from waiting so long… plus he could have put our cars to fuel up and continued chatting, he didn’t offer to clean the windows and was kind of rude (this just happened today May 15th at 00:30 and the gas station attendant was a dark-haired guy!!!!

reviewReply.comment: Es importante para nosotros su aporte y nos ayuda a mejorar. Muchas gracias por su tiempo en comentarnos su inconveniente y lamentamos muchisimo lo ocurrido.

reviews.comment:
La atención impecable del chico de playa Enrique que enseguida nos ayudó con un inconveniente en la luces para poder seguir viajando, al igual que su compañera que nos atendio super amable. Un placer encontrar gente que además de hacer bien su trabajo tienen un plus y hacen la diferencia.

(Translated by Google)
The impeccable service from Enrique, the young man at the beach bar, who immediately helped us with a problem with the lights so we could continue our journey, as did his colleague, who was incredibly kind. It's a pleasure to find people who, in addition to doing their job well, go the extra mile and make all the difference.
